fields.reason: 证据b0002明确列出作者为Shangping Chen
证据b0002明确列出作者为Radhakanta Rana
证据b0002明确列出作者为Arunansu Haldar
证据b0002明确列出作者为Ranjit Kumar Ray
证据b0013关键词是Low density steels
证据b0021关键词是Stacking fault energy

fields.value: This review covers the physical metallurgy, processing strategies, strengthening mechanisms and mechanical properties of Fe-Mn-Al-C low density steels for automotive applications, and suggests future avenues.
fields.reason: 证据b0023摘要中描述覆盖了论文范围
证据b0023摘要指出这是一篇综述

fields.value: Current state of Fe-Mn-Al-C low density steels
fields.reason: 证据b0001标题是Current state of Fe-Mn-Al-C low density steels
证据中没有明确的别名'fully austenitic Fe-Mn-Al-C'
证据中没有明确的别名'age-hardenable austenitic'
证据b0026中提到austenitic steels，指这类钢
证据b0089表格中显示austenitic钢含有Al
证据b0089表格中显示austenitic钢含有Mn
证据b0089表格中显示austenitic钢含有C

fields.value: Single-phase gamma after solution treatment; precipitation of kappa'-carbide when Al>7% and C>0.7%. Best properties in Al 7-10%, Mn 15-30%, C 0.7-1.2%.
fields.reason: 证据b0091和b0255支持了单相gamma、kappa'析出及成分范围，但表述不逐字对应

fields.value: Austenite based duplex low density steel
Hot-rolled: gamma + small fraction of delta-ferrite (<50%); often contains intragranular nano-sized kappa'-carbides and delta-ferrite stringers.
fields.reason: 证据b0093和b0089支持了delta-ferrite和kappa'的描述，但并非逐字对应
证据b0055表格中有Fe-30Mn-1.2C，证据b0001标题指出TWIP，可推断别名

fields.value: Used as baseline in various figures to compare the effect of Al addition.
fields.reason: 证据b0241和b0075指出Al-free钢作为对比基线
证据b0083提到'Ferritic Fe–Al low-density alloys'

fields.value: Matrix is delta-ferrite; Al content above 7% leads to embrittlement due to ordering (K1, B2, DO3).
fields.reason: 证据b0083和b0313支持了δ-ferrite基体及有序相引起的脆化，但非逐字对应
证据b0092描述ferrite based duplex，包含ferrite-based duplex

fields.value: Ferrite based duplex low density steel
fields.reason: 证据b0026和b0092中分类有ferrite based duplex

fields.value: Hot-rolled microstructure: gamma + delta-ferrite, with delta-ferrite fraction >50%. Cold rolling and intercritical annealing produce TRIP/TWIP effects.
fields.reason: 证据b0092和b0307支持了gamma+delta及TRIP/TWIP，但非精确对应

fields.value: Solution treatment at 900-1100 °C in single-phase gamma region, water quenching; optional aging at 450-700 °C for kappa' precipitation hardening, or cold rolling + recrystallization annealing.
fields.reason: 证据b0197和b0208支持了固溶处理和时效的温度范围，但表述更概括

fields.value: Age hardening from intragranular kappa'-carbides; overaging leads to grain boundary kappa* and loss of ductility.
fields.reason: 证据b0211和b0258支持了时效硬化和过时效影响，但非逐字对应

fields.value: Hot rolling in single gamma or (gamma+delta) region, solution treatment 900-1100 °C, water quenching; optional aging at 450-700 °C.
fields.reason: 证据b0196和b0197描述了热轧和固溶工艺，支持主要含义

fields.value: Process variants to control kappa-carbide precipitation and delta-ferrite morphology.
fields.reason: 证据b0236和b0304讨论了κ碳化物和δ铁素体的控制，但非精确描述

fields.value: Solution treatment at 1100 °C, water quenching (reference condition for TWIP).
fields.reason: 证据b0368表4中DSBR合金有1100°C/2h，但非直接对应Fe30Mn1.2C；b0197描述了类似工艺

fields.value: Ingot casting, homogenization at 1100-1250 °C, hot rolling, cold rolling, recrystallization annealing at 700-950 °C.
fields.reason: 证据b0194、b0195和b0204描述了铁素体钢的铸锭、均质化、热轧、冷轧和退火，但非逐字对应

fields.value: Grain refinement limited; texture control via cold rolling and annealing.
fields.reason: 证据b0204讨论了晶粒细化和织构控制，但表述并非完全一致

fields.value: Hot rolling in (delta+gamma) region, cold rolling, intercritical annealing at 700-900 °C followed by fast cooling or austempering.
fields.reason: 证据b0195和b0305描述了双相钢的冷轧和临界退火工艺，支持主要步骤

fields.value: Austempering used to stabilize austenite. Control of austenite grain size and stability is critical for TRIP/TWIP.
fields.reason: 证据b0305和b0307讨论了奥氏体稳定化和TRIP/TWIP控制，但非逐字对应
证据b0368表4中DSBR合金为120min，但Fe30Mn1.2C参考钢的处理时间未明确给出
证据b0345提到deformation twins在TWIP钢中出现，但该合金为Al-free TWIP reference，应含有变形孪晶
证据b0186和b0208指出单相奥氏体，体积分数可视为1
证据指出单相奥氏体，相数为1
证据b0345提到变形孪晶，b0091提到单相奥氏体，综合支持

fields.value: Revealed SRO, kappa' carbides, planar glide, deformation twins, ordered phases.
fields.reason: 证据中多处讨论了SRO、κ'、PLANAR GLIDE等，但非逐字对应

fields.value: Microstructural characterization of phases, precipitates, dislocations, and deformation mechanisms.
fields.reason: 证据b0053和b0023概括了表征目的，但并非直接陈述

fields.value: OM, SEM, TEM, XRD, ECCI, APT
fields.reason: 证据b0344和b0348中提到了TEM、ECCI、XRD等，但未完整列出OM、SEM、APT；OM/SEM在文中多处使用

fields.value: Estimate density of ferritic and austenitic Fe-Mn-Al-C alloys
fields.reason: 证据b0058和b0062给出了密度公式，用于估算密度
证据b0058标题为密度，公式为预测公式
证据b0064明确给出1.3% reduction per 1% Al

fields.value: Composition boundary for intragranular kappa' precipitation
fields.reason: 证据b0253和b0254给出κ'析出的成分边界公式
证据b0253中明确为κ' precipitation boundary

fields.value: Based on critical lattice constant of austenite ~0.3670 nm.
fields.reason: 证据b0253提到critical lattice constant 0.3670 nm

fields.value: Reasonable agreement but deviations at high Mn and Al; e.g., calculated formation temperatures of kappa and M23C6 underestimated by up to 150 °C.
Young's modulus of low density steels decreases by 2-2.5% per 1 wt% Al addition and is significantly lower than that of conventional HSLA steels (~160-175 GPa vs 210 GPa).
fields.reason: 证据b0074指出2-2.5% reduction per 1% Al，并给出典型E值

fields.value: Addition of Al suppresses cementite precipitation and promotes short-range ordering (SRO) and kappa'-carbide, which leads to glide plane softening and planar slip.
fields.reason: 证据b0225和b0370支持Al抑制渗碳体、促进SRO和κ'，导致平面滑移

fields.value: Three new deformation mechanisms are introduced for high-SFE austenitic Fe-Mn-Al-C steels: microband induced plasticity (MBIP), dynamic slip band refinement (DSBR), and shear band induced plasticity (SIP).
fields.reason: 证据b0341、b0345和b0352分别介绍了MBIP、DSBR和SIP机制

fields.value: Effective Al composition range for austenitic low-density steels with best mechanical properties is 7-10 wt% Al, with typical compositions: 15-30% Mn, 7-10% Al, 0.7-1.2% C.
fields.reason: 证据b0523明确给出了7-10% Al和典型成分范围

fields.value: The ferrite based duplex low-density steels can achieve a combination of TRIP and TWIP effects, showing UTS up to 900 MPa and total elongation up to 70%.
fields.reason: 证据b0388和b0401支持TRIP/TWIP效果及UTS 900MPa、70%延伸率

fields.value: Specific stiffness of low density steels (E^(n)/rho) is not higher than that of HSLA steels and aluminium alloys; therefore, parts must be selected where stiffness is not the limiting factor.
fields.reason: 证据b0076指出specific stiffness并不优于HSLA和铝合金

fields.value: Fatigue behaviour data are limited and conflicting; formability, weldability, and coatability are not well documented.
fields.reason: 证据b0026提到疲劳数据有限且矛盾，b0529补充了信息

fields.value: Corrosion resistance of Fe-Mn-Al-C alloys is not improved over conventional high strength steels; coating is needed for automotive applications.
fields.reason: 证据b0506和b0532指出腐蚀性能未改善，需要涂层
